A

AdjustableSemaphore - Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue.util
A Semaphore whose maximum number of permits can be adjusted at runtime.
AdjustableSemaphore() - Constructor for class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.AdjustableSemaphore
Creates a new AdjustableSemaphore with zero initial permits and fair ordering.
availablePermits() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Returns the number of permits currently available, i.e.
availablePermits() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the number of permits currently available, i.e.

B

build() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Builds and returns a configured QueueProcessor.
builder() - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Creates an empty builder.
builder(String, Path, Class<T1>, Consumer<T1>, ExecutorService) - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Creates a pre-populated builder with all mandatory fields set.

C

checkInterrupt() - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.ThreadUtil
Throws InterruptedException if the current thread's interrupt flag is set, clearing the flag in the process.
clear() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
Removes all items from the queue map.
close() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Stops the queue processor and waits for all in-flight items to finish processing.
close() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
Closes this filequeue and frees up all resources associated to it.
commit() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
Commits any pending changes to the underlying MVStore.
compareTo(MVStoreQueue) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
Compares this queue to another by directory path then name, consistent with equals(java.lang.Object).
config(String, Path, Class<T>, Consumer<? super T>, ExecutorService) - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Creates a FileQueue.Config with all mandatory fields set, ready for further customisation via its fluent setter methods.
Config() - Constructor for class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Creates an empty configuration.
Config(String, Path, Class<T>, Consumer<? super T>, ExecutorService) - Constructor for class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Creates a fully-populated configuration with the mandatory fields set.
consume(T) - Method in interface io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.Consumer
Consume the given item.
consumer(Consumer<? super T>) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the consumer callback that processes items dequeued from the queue.
consumer(Consumer<? super T>) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the consumer callback that processes items dequeued from the queue.
Consumer<T> - Interface in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
Implement this interface to consume items on the queue.
Consumer.Result - Enum Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
Result of consumption.

D

DEFAULT_CORE_POOL_SIZE - Static variable in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.ThreadUtil
Default core pool size used when constructing executor services.
DelayRejectPolicy - Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
DelayRejectPolicy
DelayRejectPolicy() - Constructor for class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.DelayRejectPolicy
Creates a DelayRejectPolicy for the given executor.
DelayRejectPolicy(long, TimeUnit) - Constructor for class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.DelayRejectPolicy
Creates a DelayRejectPolicy that waits up to timeOut in the given timeUnit before throwing a RejectedExecutionException.
destroy() - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Shuts down the shared processor thread pool.
destroy() - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Shuts down the shared MVStore cleanup scheduler and awaits termination for up to 60 seconds.

E

equals(Object) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
 
executorService(ExecutorService) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the ExecutorService used to dispatch item-processing tasks.
expiration(Expiration<T>) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the expiration handler invoked when an item exceeds the maximum number of delivery attempts.
expiration(Expiration<T>) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the expiration handler invoked when an item exceeds the maximum number of delivery attempts.
Expiration<T> - Interface in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
Implement this interface to receive notification when a queued item has expired due to maximum number of retries exceeded.
expire(T) - Method in interface io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.Expiration
Expiration notification
EXPONENTIAL - Enum constant in enum class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm
Doubles the delay after each failed attempt, up to maxRetryDelay.

F

FAIL_NOQUEUE - Enum constant in enum class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.Consumer.Result
Processing of item failed permanently.
FAIL_REQUEUE - Enum constant in enum class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.Consumer.Result
Processing of item failed, however retry later.
fileQueue() - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Factory method that creates a new, uninitialised FileQueue instance.
FileQueue<T> - Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue
FileQueue is a fast, efficient, persistent queue written in Java and backed by H2 MVStore.
FileQueue() - Constructor for class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Creates a new, uninitialised FileQueue instance.
FileQueue.Config<T> - Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue
Immutable-style configuration builder for FileQueue.
FileQueueItem - Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue
Extend this abstract class to include the properties of a queue item.
FileQueueItem() - Constructor for class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueueItem
Default constructor for subclasses and Jackson deserialisation.
FIXED - Enum constant in enum class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm
Applies a constant delay between each retry attempt.

G

getConfig() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Returns the active queue configuration.
getConsumer() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured consumer callback.
getConsumer() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the consumer callback.
getConsumer() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured consumer.
getExecutorService() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured executor service.
getExpiration() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured expiration handler.
getExpiration() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the expiration handler, or null if not set.
getExpiration() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured expiration handler.
getFlexibleThreadFactory(String) - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.ThreadUtil
Returns a ThreadFactory that creates named platform threads.
getFlexibleThreadFactory(String, boolean) - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.ThreadUtil
Returns a ThreadFactory that creates named platform threads with the specified daemon status.
getGroupThreadFactory(ThreadGroup, String, boolean) - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.ThreadUtil
Returns a ThreadFactory that creates named platform threads belonging to the given ThreadGroup.
getMaxQueueSize() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured maximum queue size.
getMaxQueueSize() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured maximum queue size.
getMaxRetryDelay() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured maximum retry delay.
getMaxRetryDelay() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the maximum retry delay (exponential back-off cap).
getMaxRetryDelay() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured maximum retry delay.
getMaxTries() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the maximum number of delivery attempts (0 means unlimited).
getMaxTries() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the maximum number of tries (0 = unlimited).
getMaxTries() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured maximum number of delivery attempts.
getNumberOfPermits() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.AdjustableSemaphore
Returns the maximum number of permits configured for this semaphore.
getPersistRetryDelay() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured persistent retry delay.
getPersistRetryDelay() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the persistent retry delay.
getPersistRetryDelay() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured persistent retry delay.
getPersistRetryDelayUnit() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured persistent retry delay time unit.
getPersistRetryDelayUnit() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the persistent retry delay time unit.
getPersistRetryDelayUnit() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured persistent retry delay time unit.
getQueueBaseDir() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the base directory used by the underlying MVStore queue.
getQueueDir() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
Returns the directory where the queue database files are stored.
getQueueName() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured queue name.
getQueueName() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the queue name.
getQueueName() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured queue name.
getQueuePath() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured queue database path.
getQueuePath() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the queue database path.
getQueuePath() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured queue database path.
getQueueSize() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Returns the number of items currently persisted in the on-disk queue store.
getRetryDelay() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured retry delay.
getRetryDelay() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the fixed retry delay.
getRetryDelay() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured retry delay.
getRetryDelayAlgorithm() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured retry delay algorithm.
getRetryDelayAlgorithm() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the retry delay algorithm.
getRetryDelayAlgorithm() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured retry delay algorithm.
getRetryDelayUnit() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured retry delay time unit.
getRetryDelayUnit() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the retry delay time unit.
getRetryDelayUnit() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured retry delay time unit.
getTryCount() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueueItem
Returns the number of delivery attempts made so far.
getTryDate() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueueItem
Returns the timestamp of the last delivery attempt, or null if the item has not yet been attempted.
getType() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Returns the configured queue item type.
getType() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the queue item type.
getType() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Returns the configured queue item type.

H

hashCode() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
 

I

incTryCount() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueueItem
Increments the try count by one.
io.stimulustech.filequeue - package io.stimulustech.filequeue
FileQueue offers a lightweight, high-performance, simple, reliable, and persistent queue for Java applications.
io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor - package io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
 
io.stimulustech.filequeue.store - package io.stimulustech.filequeue.store
 
io.stimulustech.filequeue.util - package io.stimulustech.filequeue.util
 
isEmpty() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
Determines if this filequeue is empty (equivalent to size() == 0).

M

maxQueueSize(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the maximum number of items the queue will hold before blocking.
maxQueueSize(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the maximum number of items the queue will hold in memory before blocking.
maxRetryDelay(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the maximum delay between retries when exponential back-off is enabled, expressed in FileQueue.Config.retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
maxRetryDelay(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the maximum delay between retries when exponential back-off is enabled, expressed in QueueProcessorBuilder.retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
maxTries(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the maximum number of delivery attempts before an item is considered expired.
maxTries(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the maximum number of delivery attempts before an item is considered expired.
MVStoreQueue - Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue.store
Fast queue implementation on top of MVStore.
MVStoreQueue(Path, String) - Constructor for class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
This class is for internal use only.

N

newFlexiThreadPool(int, int, ThreadFactory) - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.ThreadUtil
Creates a flexible thread pool where threads are created on demand up to maximumPoolSize and expire after 60 seconds of inactivity.
newFlexiThreadPool(int, ThreadFactory) - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.ThreadUtil
Creates a flexible thread pool with a single core thread and up to maximumPoolSize threads, using the supplied factory.

O

objectMapper(ObjectMapper) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Supplies a custom ObjectMapper for serialising and deserialising queue items.

P

persistRetryDelay(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the interval at which items persisted to disk are re-examined for reprocessing, expressed in FileQueue.Config.persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
persistRetryDelay(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the interval at which items persisted to disk are re-examined for reprocessing, expressed in QueueProcessorBuilder.persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the time unit for FileQueue.Config.persistRetryDelay(int).
persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the time unit for QueueProcessorBuilder.persistRetryDelay(int).
poll() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
Retrieves and and removes element from the head of this filequeue.
push(byte[]) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
Pushes element to the tail of this filequeue.

Q

queueItem(T) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Queues an item for delivery, blocking indefinitely until a free slot is available.
queueItem(T1, int, TimeUnit) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Queues an item for delivery, waiting up to acquireWait for a free slot.
queueName(String) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets a human-readable name for the queue.
queueName(String) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets a human-readable name for the queue.
queuePath(Path) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the path to the queue database directory.
queuePath(Path) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the path to the queue database directory.
QueueProcessor<T> - Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
Internal queue processor responsible for dispatching FileQueueItem instances to a Consumer, persisting items that cannot be immediately processed, and retrying them according to the configured delay strategy.
QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm - Enum Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
Algorithm used to calculate the delay between successive delivery attempts.
QueueProcessorBuilder<T> - Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
Builder for constructing a QueueProcessor.

R

rejectedExecution(Runnable, ThreadPoolExecutor) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.DelayRejectPolicy
Obtains and ignores the next task that the executor would otherwise execute, if one is immediately available, and then retries execution of task r, unless the executor is shut down, in which case task r is instead discarded.
reopen() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Reopens the underlying MVStore queue after it has been closed.
reopen() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
Reopens the underlying MVStore, discarding any previous open handle.
retryDelay(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the fixed delay between delivery attempts, expressed in FileQueue.Config.retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
retryDelay(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the fixed delay between delivery attempts, expressed in QueueProcessorBuilder.retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
retryDelayAlgorithm(QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the retry delay algorithm.
retryDelayAlgorithm(QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the retry delay algorithm.
retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the time unit for FileQueue.Config.retryDelay(int) and FileQueue.Config.maxRetryDelay(int).
retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the time unit for QueueProcessorBuilder.retryDelay(int) and QueueProcessorBuilder.maxRetryDelay(int).

S

setMaxPermits(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.AdjustableSemaphore
Sets the maximum number of permits available to this semaphore.
setMaxQueueSize(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Adjusts the maximum number of items the queue will hold concurrently.
setMaxQueueSize(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Adjusts the maximum number of items that may be held concurrently by the queue.
setTryCount(int) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueueItem
Overrides the try count.
setTryDate(Instant) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueueItem
Sets the timestamp of the last delivery attempt.
shutdownAndAwaitTermination(ExecutorService, long, TimeUnit) - Static method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.ThreadUtil
Shuts down the given executor, waiting up to timeout for tasks to finish, then forcing a shutdown if tasks have not completed.
size() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Returns the number of items currently persisted in the on-disk queue store.
size() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.store.MVStoreQueue
Returns the size of this filequeue.
startQueue(FileQueue.Config<T>) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Starts the queue engine using the supplied configuration.
stopQueue() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue
Stops the queue engine and blocks until all in-flight items have either been processed or persisted back to the on-disk store.
submit(T) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Submits an item for processing, blocking indefinitely until a free slot becomes available.
submit(T, int, TimeUnit) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor
Submits an item for immediate processing.
SUCCESS - Enum constant in enum class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.Consumer.Result
Processing of item was successful.

T

ThreadUtil - Class in io.stimulustech.filequeue.util
Thread and executor utility methods.
toString() - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueueItem
 
type(Class<? extends T>) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessorBuilder
Sets the class of items stored in the queue.
type(Type) - Method in class io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config
Sets the concrete FileQueueItem subclass stored by this queue.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.Consumer.Result
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.Consumer.Result
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor.QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
